name: Enchilada Casserole II
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble beef into a shallow, 2 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish.
2. Sprinkle meat with minced onion and crushed garlic.
3. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 5 minutes. Stir occasionally to break up the meat.
4. Drain excess fat. Add pepper, chili powder, water, and tomato sauce. Stir to combine. Heat, uncovered, for 4 minutes in Microwave Oven.
5. Alternately layer tortillas, meat sauce, and cheese in a round-1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish. The last layer should be cheese.
6. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 7 to 9 minutes or until cheese is melted.
